title.inquiry: Create your free account to send this inquiry.
title.publish: Create your free account to publish.
title.alert: Create your free account to save this alert.
title.verify: Create your free account to run this check.

body.inquiry: Your message is saved. One email, no password.
body.publish: Your listing and its write-up are saved. One email, no password.
body.alert: Your alert is saved. One email, no password.
body.verify: Your search is saved. One email, no password.

profile.heading: Two details and you are in
profile.body: This is all we ask for now. The rest can wait until you need it.

gate.credits: You have {balance} credits. Verifying a counterparty costs {cost}.

doneBody.inquiry: Your inquiry is with the other side. You will be notified when they respond.
doneBody.publish: Your listing is with the desk for vetting. You will be emailed when it goes live.
doneBody.alert: We will email you when something on the board matches it.
doneBody.verify: The report appears in your account as soon as it is ready.

gate.actionFailed: That did not go through. You can finish it from your account.
